title: neslia paniculata subsp. paniculata
intro: Neslia paniculata subsp. paniculata, also known as yellow meadow-grass or yellow cleavers, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Neslia paniculata subsp. paniculata include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Neslia paniculata subsp. paniculata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
